texto: Islam appears to me like a perfect work of architecture. All its parts are harmoniously conceived to complement and support each other
autor: nothing is superfluous and nothing lacking
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a nothing is superfluous and nothing lacking: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Islam appears to me like a perfect work of architecture. All its parts are harmoniously conceived…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e trabalho.
